title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.240 - Actuary, duties
text:
86.240.  Actuary, duties. — The actuary shall be the technical adviser of the* board of trustees on matters regarding the operation of the retirement system created by sections 86.200 to 86.366 and shall perform such other duties as are required in connection therewith.
(L. 1957 p. 256 § 13, A.L. 2000 H.B. 1808) 
Effective 7-01-00 
*Word "the" does not appear in original rolls.
